stem: A sphere has a radius of 11/4 feet. What is the volume, in cubic feet, of the sphere?
rationale: Choice C is correct. The volume V of a sphere with radius r is V = (4/3)πr3. Substituting r = 11/4 yields V = (4/3)π(11/4)3 = (4/3)π(1331/64) = 5324π/192 = 1331π/48 cubic feet. Choices A, B, and D are incorrect and result from formula or arithmetic errors.
